title: chenopodium murale var. biforme
intro: Chenopodium murale var. biforme, also known as the netleaf goosefoot, is a subspecies of the Chenopodium murale plant, which belongs to the goosefoot family of plants. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Chenopodium murale var. biforme include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Chenopodium murale var. biforme can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
